slides.title: Tokenized Deposits
slides.subtitle:
Revolutionizing Banking with Digital Assets
Powered by SettleMint DALP

slides.title: Market Opportunity
slides.body:
The global deposits market represents $50+ trillion.

Key Drivers:
• $12T cross-border payments annually
• 200M+ businesses need B2B payments
• Growing demand for 24/7 settlement
• DeFi integration demands

Banks are tokenizing to modernize infrastructure and reduce costs.

slides.title: What Are Tokenized Deposits?
slides.body:
Digital representation of traditional bank deposits on blockchain.

Key Characteristics:
• 1:1 backing with fiat currency
• Issued by licensed banks
• Instant transfer capability
• Programmable via smart contracts
• Full regulatory compliance

Unlike stablecoins - issued by banks under banking regulations.

slides.title: Benefits
slides.col1:
For Banks
• 90% cross-border cost reduction
• Instant settlement
• New revenue streams
• Automated compliance
slides.col2:
For Customers
• Faster payments
• Lower fees
• 24/7 availability
• Transparent transactions

slides.title: Technical Architecture
slides.body:
SettleMint DALP provides bank-grade infrastructure.

Core Components:
• ERC-1400 compliant tokens
• Multi-chain deployment
• Oracle integration for fiat
• KYC/AML compliance modules
• Custody solutions

Integrates with core banking systems and payment gateways.

slides.title: Use Cases
slides.item1:
B2B cross-border
Move commercial payment flows toward faster settlement with clearer policy checks and distribution controls.
slides.item2:
Supply chain
Coordinate programmable release conditions with bank-issued value and auditable workflow steps.
slides.item3:
Treasury operations
Improve internal liquidity movement, visibility, and approval discipline across legal entities and accounts.
slides.item4:
Escrow and milestone release
Tie release conditions to governed events instead of manual reconciliation and exception handling.

slides.title: Regulatory Framework
slides.body:
Tokenized deposits operate within existing banking regulations.

Compliance Pillars:
• Bank-issued (not protocol)
• Full KYC/AML integration
• Capital requirements met
• Consumer protection laws
• Data privacy (GDPR)

SettleMint provides regulatory expertise across jurisdictions.

slides.title: Why SettleMint?
slides.body:
Trusted partner for bank-grade tokenization.

Our Track Record:

We help banks navigate requirements and scale to production.
